creator: bzeeb+freebsdports@zabbadoz.net
text:
On Wed, 25 Mar 2009, Thomas Abthorpe wrote:

Hey,

> Would you like me to close this PR? Or go ahead with the patch as provided?

What about suspending it until we can find a proper fix?  Or is that
only something src people do? ;-)

That way we can still track it and people wondering why it doesn´t
work for them will still find in, in conbtrast to closed PRs which
query-pr.cgi usually hides unless expolicitly asked for.

-- 
Bjoern A. Zeeb                      The greatest risk is not taking one.
